data.title: Legendary Investor Warns US Stocks Are Reaching Dangerous Levels, Sounds Alarm On 'Super Bubble'—Is A Market Correction Coming?
data.description: Long-term investment strategist and co-founder of GMO Investment and Asset Management, Jeremy Grantham, issued a warning about a potential “super bubble” in the U.S. stock market.

data.title: Flight Or Fright? Poll Reveals Whether Plane Mishaps Hurt Air Travel In 2025
data.description: A Benzinga poll reveals that some passengers may feel uneasy about getting on planes in 2025 after several recent flight mishaps.

data.title: New Jersey Governor's Cannabis Tax Hike Sparks Debate
data.description: Gov. Murphy's proposal to raise New Jersey's cannabis excise tax from $2.50 to $15 per ounce has ignited a fierce debate.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Target Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
New Jersey Opens Door To Cannabis Lounges, Setting Stage For Industry Expansion
data.description: New Jersey launches licensing process for cannabis consumption lounges in 2025. Market surpasses $1B in sales. Benzinga event to address growth.
